name: Unifi-Toolkit
description: A third-party web-based toolkit for managing Ubiquiti Unifi networks (not affiliated with Ubiquiti). Provides an alternative interface for configuring Unifi devices. Requires an existing Unifi Controller to connect to via API.

variables.name: Deployment Type
variables.description: Deployment mode: 'local' for homelab, 'production' for public access with auth.

variables.name: Unifi Controller URL
variables.description: Local controller IP/hostname (e.g., https://192.168.1.1). Note: Cloud access via unifi.ui.com is NOT supported.

variables.name: Unifi API Key
variables.description: API key from Unifi OS Settings → Admins (recommended). Generate in your Unifi Controller.

variables.name: Unifi Username (Optional)
variables.description: Optional: Fallback username only if NOT using API key. Leave empty if using UNIFI_API_KEY (recommended).

variables.name: Unifi Password (Optional)
variables.description: Optional: Fallback password only if NOT using API key. Leave empty if using UNIFI_API_KEY (recommended).

variables.name: Unifi Site ID
variables.description: Site ID from URL, not friendly name. Use ID from /manage/site/{id}/... (default: default).

variables.name: Verify SSL
variables.description: SSL verification (default: false). Set to true only with valid SSL certificates.
